about JLLM/sytem: current system I recommend you leave the JLLM like this: temperature 0.85-1.0 and 500-800 Max tokens but if you want you can put only 0 tokens (which most use) but you decide and find it best in your experience in the answers I don't know how this can affect the proxy or OpenAI, at the moment if the bot generates a bugged response or talk for the user I recommend you generate a new response or edit it, If the bot does not act like the character or leaves the character and same thing (memory chat also helps with this) now have good fun in the bot, I recommend that you leave your answers longer and more detailed to have a better experience

the characters are over 18 years old all the characters I make are always over 18 years old, Send your ratings/comments if you liked them or the bot needs improvements, every day I'm trying to improve your ratings/comments always help me to continue making my bots 🐈‍⬛ and have more motivation to keep making bots always, you can also send suggestions at any time on my bots (I recommend sending suggestions on my discord server or discord DM)
